profile.name: Mayank Chopra
profile.title: Software Development Engineer
profile.tagline: I build reliable backend platforms, cloud-native services, and practical frontend experiences across enterprise and startup environments.
profile.bio: Software Development Engineer at Fynd with prior BFSI experience at Barclays Global Service Center. My background spans Java, React, microservices, REST APIs, CI/CD, OpenShift, Kafka, secure engineering practices, and the pace of startup-driven product development.

experience.summary: Working as an SDE-1 in a startup-driven engineering environment focused on rapid development, innovation, and continuous technical growth.
highlights: Joined Fynd as a Software Development Engineer after transitioning from the BFSI domain into a product-led startup environment.
Bringing a security and compliance mindset from enterprise banking systems into faster-moving development workflows.
Focused on learning, adapting, and building in an environment that emphasizes rapid iteration and innovation.

experience.company: Barclays Global Service Center Pvt Ltd
experience.summary: Built enterprise notification platforms, micro frontends, secure runtime libraries, and CI/CD foundations for containerized applications.
highlights: Designed and re-implemented an event-driven notifications platform using REST APIs, SQL, microservices, and Kafka-based retries to process 250K+ notifications monthly.
Developed modular React.js UI components inside a Micro Frontend architecture for a legacy enterprise application.
Engineered password rotation for 20+ containerized applications on OpenShift with a modular runtime credential library and zero downtime.
Remediated vulnerabilities across 30+ microservices using Veracode, SonarQube, Prisma, and secure coding fixes, reducing reported security issues by 90%.
Developed and maintained Jenkins, Maven, and Kubernetes CI/CD pipelines for automated builds and cloud-native deployments.
Improved code quality with JUnit and Mockito, supported Java 8 to 21 migration, upgraded Docker images, and monitored systems with the ELK Stack.

experience.summary: Built Flutter learning experiences backed by database content and REST API integrations.
highlights: Designed and developed a Flutter tutorials app UI for streaming video lessons and accessing PDF materials from a backend database.
Added support for 15+ research paper categories and integrated a news feed through an existing REST API, improving content variety and engagement.

projects.name: StockRack
projects.summary: A stock holdings dashboard with user login, REST APIs, transaction tracking, filters, visual insights, and backend error handling through custom middleware.

projects.name: Glance
projects.summary: An Angular, Spring Boot, and SQL Server app for uploading, managing, and sharing pictures with authentication, REST APIs, fast uploads, secure storage, and streamlined UI logic.

source.linkedinNote: The PDF contained the LinkedIn profile URL. Portfolio content combines the resume PDF with the user-provided Mayank Chopra LinkedIn post announcing his Mar 2026 Fynd SDE-1 role.
